title: [Hereditary optic neuropathies: clinical and molecular genetic characteristics].
author_string: Khanakova, N A, Sheremet, N L, Loginova, A N, Chukhrova, A L, Poliakov, A V
abstract: The article presents a review of literature on hereditary optic neuropathies: Leber mitochondrial hereditary optic neuropathy, autosomal dominant and autosomal recessive optic neuropathies, X-linked optic atrophy. Clinical and molecular genetic characteristics are covered. Isolated optic neuropathies, as well as hereditary optic disorders, being a part of a complex syndromic disease are described.
